payload: Neo4j schema initialization script: 8 unique constraints (Politician, Legislation, LegislativeVote, Party, Province, Investigation, User id+email), 3 fulltext indexes (name, title, summary), 5 range indexes (slug, chamber, status, date, tier). Idempotent, runnable via npm run db:init-schema. Committed as d7410b1.

Created ETL types+Zod schemas for Como Voto pipeline (src/etl/como-voto/types.ts + index.ts). Schemas: CompactLegislator, VotingSession, LegislatorDetail, LegislatorVote, Term. Neo4j param types: Politician, Party, Province, LegislativeVote, CastVote/MemberOf/Represents rels. Typecheck+lint+format pass. Committed ba9243e. Next: fetcher, transformer, loader, runner.

Created politician query functions (getPoliticianBySlug, getPoliticianVoteHistory, getAllPoliticianSlugs) in lib/graph/politician-queries.ts. Committed d1950d7. M4 task 1 of 2 complete. Next: SSR profile page at /politico/[slug].

M5 Auth config + API routes complete: @auth/core config with Credentials + Google OAuth, catch-all at /api/auth/[...path], signup at POST /api/auth/signup with Zod validation + duplicate check. Committed 0608788.
Session helpers complete (a0b7e47). Next: Auth UI (task-1773738980-8572)
TipTap deps installed + investigation types/schemas created. Committed 74268e5. M6 task 1 of 7 complete.
TipTap editor component with toolbar — InvestigationEditor with rich text toolbar, GraphNodeEmbed custom extension, GraphNodePicker search UI, tiptap.d.ts ambient types. Committed 21c444f.
Investigations index + my investigations pages committed 6f6f606. M6 Investigation Engine is code-complete. All 8 tasks done.

PDF export for investigations implemented. PrintButton triggers window.print() with print-friendly CSS. Zero dependencies. M7 Share & Distribution is complete. Committed 3fa28f7. Next: M8 Seed Content + Launch.
